body.notes: Recurring failure mode observed 2026-04-19 on SWADL anchor deposit. Igor (qwen2.5:7b) authored perfect store_memory(...) calls for 4 concepts and returned them as ```python ...``` code blocks instead of dispatching the tools. First call in the same conversation did dispatch correctly. Pattern: first tool call works, subsequent calls in the same reply become descriptive text. Hypothesis candidates: (1) prompt framing leads LLM to treat spec-given IDs as 'write the code' not 'execute it'; (2) tool-calling protocol doesn't loop after first turn-complete signal; (3) qwen2.5:7b specific limitation with multi-tool-call replies. Fix options: (a) post-process Igor's replies to detect fenced tool-call blocks + dispatch them; (b) adjust prompt to force explicit tool_use signals; (c) switch orchestration to one-tool-call-per-turn loop. Workaround today: CC dispatched the 4 remaining from Igor's narratives with source='igor_self_authored_2026_04_19'.
body.title: LLM prints tool invocations as code blocks instead of calling them
body.result: Discarded — zero description, zero priority, origin unknown.
